data.title: What's Going On With Baker Hughes Stock Today?
data.description: Baker Hughes stock rises after being selected by the U.S. Air Force to develop geothermal power plants for military bases, enhancing energy security.

data.title: Trump To Nominate Fed's Michelle Bowman As Top Banking Regulator: Report
data.description: President Donald Trump is set to nominate Fed Governor Michelle Bowman as the central bank's vice chair for supervision, per Bloomberg. The nomination could be announced as early as today, marking a significant shift in the Fed's regulatory leadership.

data.title: Japanese Growth Allows For BOJ's Hikes, Provides Trading Opportunities In 2025
GE Aerospace Doubles Down On US Manufacturing With $1B Investment: Details
data.description: GE Aerospace announces a near $1 billion investment in U.S. manufacturing to enhance production, engine safety, and cutting-edge material integration. This initiative, nearly double last year's commitment, will positively impact over 24 communities in 16 states, improving delivery and product quality.

data.title: Sanofi Stock Forms Golden Cross As Dupixent Eyes FDA Green Light: Can The Bullish Run Continue?
data.description: Sanofi stock is surging with a Golden Cross formation and promising Dupixent results. With FDA review and potential approval, investors are excited.
